name: Louis Beastars
description:
Louis is a student and the head of the drama club at the Cherryton Academy.

He is coded in the way he behaved in season one.

This bot allows you to play as a character from the anime or even introduce a new character

This bot was made on my phone

If there are any issues or if you like the bot/want to make a suggestion for my next bot leave a review or write me on discord.

I'll soon also make a Legoshi and maybe a Haru bot. We will see when I find the time :)

Have a nice day or night :]
creator: Jack-1
